message:
fix: exclude rejected handoffs from cleanup to avoid invalid transition

The cleanup job was attempting to transition expired 'rejected' handoffs
to 'failed' state, but the state machine only allows rejected -> cancelled
transitions. This would silently fail.

Rejected handoffs are now excluded from cleanup since they already
triggered fallback behavior (escalate/broadcast/retry/abort) when
they were rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
